"C:\Program Files\CMake\bin\cmake.exe" -E rm -f CMakeFiles\game.dir/objects.a
C:\mingw64\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\game.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\game.dir\objects1.rsp
C:\mingw64\bin\c++.exe  -Wall -Wextra -g -DDEBUG -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\game.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o D:\projects\2DGameEngine\bin\game.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libgame.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\game.dir\linkLibs.rsp
